Electrical and Electronics Engineering

Our Mission

MENU

The aim of the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, where electronics, computer and communication sciences, which constitute the main structure of today's technology, are presented together, is to train research engineers who push the limits of competition at the international level to the limit, have strong professional ethics, protect human values, are equipped with theoretical and practical knowledge at a level that can follow the latest technologies and requirements in the field and update their knowledge, and thus bring permanent and creative solutions to problems, have analytical thinking, problem solving and modelling skills.

In order to become an internationally leading higher education institution in the field of electronics and communication technologies, it is one of the biggest goals of our university to become a science centre that shapes the technology of the future by creating a base in the synthesis of universal science and modern education, researching, discovering and producing new knowledge and technologies with its academic staff as well as the engineers it trains.
